text.title: Terse Default Tool Output Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules forcing tools to default to compact, semantic output and accept a verbosity opt-in parameter.

rule.statement: Any tool whose worst-case output exceeds ~500 tokens MUST default to a compact shape (summary line, table of IDs, top-N) AND accept `format: Literal["summary","full"]` (or equivalent verbosity enum) so the agent can opt into raw payloads on demand.
rule.rationale: SkillReducer compressed tool bodies by ~40% and observed a 2.8% absolute task-quality LIFT — verbose context distracts the model and inflates per-call cost across the rest of the loop. Compact-by-default plus opt-in verbose preserves correctness without the bloat.

rule.statement: The summary shape MUST include a stable identifier (row id, file path, span_id) per item so the agent can escalate that specific row to `format="full"` without re-querying.

rationale.source: Internal — observed in test-author subagent runs Q1 2026

rule.rationale: A summary that lists only headlines forces a second search call to find the ID; the round trip costs more tokens than the verbose default would have.

rule.statement: When the result set is cut to a `limit`, the response MUST carry `truncated: true` and `total_hits` (or upper-bound estimate); silent truncation is forbidden.

rationale.source: Harness — Agent loop new OS; internal pagination postmortems

rule.rationale: If the model thinks it saw all results, it stops calling. Explicit truncation flags force it to paginate or widen the query.

rule.statement: Tool description MUST state the expected token-cost band for each format mode (e.g. `summary` ~30 tok/hit, `full` ~300-1200 tok/hit) so the planner can budget calls.
rule.rationale: The planner picks between tools partly on context cost; without a documented band the model under-estimates by 5-10x.

rule.statement: When the agent passes `format="full"`, the call MUST include a one-sentence `reason` argument (audit, debug, exact-match) that the host can log. Eval gates raw-mode usage rate per task.
rule.rationale: Without justification, agents default to `format="full"` to "be safe", and context bloat returns. Logged justifications surface the few cases where it is actually needed.
